_note: MM-GBSA endpoint RESCORING of the matrix docked poses (single-snapshot, 1-trajectory, enthalpy + GBn2; NO entropy, NO ensemble average). Tests whether the docking-level NR4A3-selectivity survives a physics-based energy model. STILL triage, NOT an affinity — that is the FEP tier.

method.scheme: 1-trajectory MULTI-snapshot; minimize + short GB Langevin MD, ΔG averaged over 10 frames @ 10.0 ps (equil 20.0 ps)
